name: bus-driver-scheduling
description: 公交司机排班管理系统

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "cd server && PORT=3202 npm run dev" "cd client && VITE_PORT=5174 VITE_API_PORT=3202 npm run dev"
